day name: Ascension of Our Lord Jesus Christ
note: After this day, "Christ is risen" and "Shine, shine" are no longer chanted until the following Pascha.
specialDismissal: Who, for our salvation, was taken up in glory from us to heaven and sits at the right hand of God the Father,
troparia: (Tone 4) You ascended in glory, O Christ our God,* giving joy to Your disciples by the promise of the Holy Spirit,* and assuring them through Your blessing* that You are the Son of God,** the Redeemer of the world.
kontakia: (Tone 6) When you had fulfilled Your plan for us* and united things on earth with those in heaven,* You ascended in glory, O Christ our God,* in no way distant, but remaining inseparable,* You cried to those who love You:* I am with You and there is none against you.
